filesCreated.purpose: Block metadata with all attributes from spec
Block registration with SVGR icon import
Editor component with ThemeHeading, FilteredServerSideRender, sidebar controls
Frontend template with WP_Query logic for automatic/manual modes, renders via card template part
Block icon (24x24, filled paths, no strokes)
Reusable event card template part with image half, date badge, content half, and CTA button

warnings: Performance size warnings on editor.js and screen bundles (pre-existing, not caused by this block)

notes: Sync warning about root wrapper mismatch (InspectorControls vs section) is a known false positive - TSX correctly uses React fragment wrapping InspectorControls + section, standard pattern for dynamic blocks with sidebar controls

implementationNotes.noJsFile: No frontend JS file created - block has no carousel, no interactive behavior. Pure PHP rendering.
implementationNotes.cardTemplatePart: Created parts/card-tribe_events.php as reusable template part. Accepts $args['buttonLabel'] from parent block. Two-panel layout: image half (left, charcoal bg, p-4, rounded-3xl) with inner image frame (rounded-xl) and floating date badge (104px, top-right). Content half (right, charcoal bg, p-6, text-white) with event title (text-header-4 uppercase), venue name, excerpt, and btn-tertiary CTA.
implementationNotes.dateHandling: Uses _EventStartDate meta key for date display. Formats to day-of-week (D), day number (j), month+year (M Y) using date_i18n for localization. Date badge aria-hidden=true since date info is in event title/context.
implementationNotes.queryLogic: Automatic mode uses WP_Query with meta_key=_EventStartDate, meta_query for future (>=now ASC) or past (<now DESC). Supports tribe_events_cat and post_tag taxonomy filters. Manual mode uses post__in with orderby=post__in.
implementationNotes.interCardGap: Used gap-6 (24px) as the default per spec unresolved decision UNRES-001 (planning defaultIfNotAsked was gap-6)
